name: Make-Ahead Sour Cream Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter in a mixing bowl for 30 seconds.
2. Add sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and ground cardamon; beat until combined.
3. Beat in sour cream until combined.
4. Beat in as much flour as you can; stir in any remaining flour.
5. Drop dough by rounded teaspoons onto cookie sheets lined with waxed paper.
6. Place sheets in the freezer; freeze for 45 minutes or until firm.
7. Transfer mounds to freezer bags or containers.
8. Freeze up to 6 months. Makes 36.
To bake: Place frozen mounds, 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets. Bake in a 350°F oven about 12 minutes, until edges begin to brown. Remove; cool.
